40.2.4 - Application of the General Principles to Occupational Therapy 
(Rev. 179, Issued: 01-14-14, Effective: 01-07-14, Implementation: 01-07-14) 
A3-3118.2.D, HHA-205.2.D 

The following discussion of skilled occupational therapy services applies the principles to 
specific occupational therapy services about which questions are most frequently raised. 
Coverage of occupational therapy
